compressed_context:
CTX: ARTICLE-34 TFEU PROHIBITS QUANTITATIVE-RESTRICTIONS ∧ EQUIVALENT MEASURES  
Q: ARE NATIONAL RENEWABLE-ENERGY SUPPORT-SCHEMES EXEMPT?  
FINDING: SCHEME FAVOURS DOMESTIC ELECTRICITY PRODUCERS ↛ EXEMPTION  
GOAL: ENVIRONMENTAL-PROTECTION (GHG-EMISSIONS-REDUCTION)  
NON-ECONOMIC-OBJECTIVE ≠ AUTOMATIC JUSTIFICATION IF MEASURE IS DISCRIMINATORY ∧ DISPROPORTIONATE  
MEASURE: EXCLUDE FOREIGN RENEWABLE-ELECTRICITY ∧ LIMIT CERTIFICATE-USAGE TO DOMESTIC PRODUCERS  
PROPORTIONALITY: AIM STIMULATE DOMESTIC PRODUCTION ∧ CONTROL CONSUMPTION WITHIN MEMBER-STATE  
RESULT: SCHEME=TRADE-RESTRICTION ∧ NON-JUSTIFIED  

====  

CTX: EU EMISSIONS-TRADING SYSTEM (ETS)  
MODEL: REGULATION-BASED MARKET WITH CAP-AND-AUCTION  
OBJECTIVE: REDUCE EMISSIONS IN ENERGY-INTENSIVE-SECTORS: CEMENT, STEEL, METAL, OIL, CHEMICAL  
ISSUE: DIVERGENT MEMBER-STATE IMPLEMENTATIONS VS COMMISSION GUIDANCE  
PLAN: AUCTION ALLOWANCES FOR 2021–2030; REVIEW 2030–2035 PHASE  
UNCERTAINTY: CROSS-BORDER ENERGY-FLOWS ∧ HYBRID MARKET-MECHANISMS  
OUTLOOK: MONITOR RENEWABLE-ENERGY STRATEGY ∧ SPEED UP MARKET-PENETRATION
